text:
昨今のアークスは、ビジフォンの利用を
おろそかにする者が多すぎる！
たるんでいると言わざるを得ん！

友との交流、物品の売買
用途は多岐に渡るのだぞ！
友がいない者は……まあ、がんばれ！

ええい、話している内にも
不安が鎌首をもたげてきた！
君、今すぐやってくるといい！

何を、って、決まっているだろう。
ビジフォンへのアクセスだ！

さあ、さあ、やってきてくれ！
そう難しいことではないはずだ！
私の不安を払拭して

Bah! Too many whippersnapper ARKS
these days never remember to whip out
their Visiphones! Just plum laziness when
ya get down to it!

Chattin' up friends, selling items... They're
handy for boatloads of things! If you don't
have friends, though... Well, that's that!

Bah! Just thinkin' about it's rustlin' my
jimmies, so I think you'd better
get on and go right this instant!

To do what, you ask? Ain't it obvious?
Go access a Visiphone!

Go on then, git! Nothin' hard about this and it
won't take much of your time. Help put this
old man's noggin to rest, wouldja?
